name: $addXpMultiplier
description: Adds an XP multiplier for a role or channel. Supply roleID or channelID (or both).

args.name: multiplier
args.description: The multiplier value (e.g. 2 = double XP).

args.name: roleID
args.description: Role ID that triggers this multiplier. Leave empty to skip.

args.name: channelID
args.description: Channel ID that triggers this multiplier. Leave empty to skip.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $clearXpMultipliers
description: Removes all XP multipliers configured for this guild.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $getLevelConfig
description: Gets a per-guild leveling config value.

args.name: key
args.description: The config key to retrieve.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $levelEnabled
description: Returns whether the leveling system is enabled in this guild.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $resetLevelConfig
description: Resets all per-guild leveling config back to extension defaults.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $setCooldown
description: Set the time between each message for XP to be counted.

args.name: time
args.description: The time to set it as.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $setIgnoredChannels
description: Sets channels where XP is not awarded. Comma-separated IDs; pass empty to clear.

args.name: channelIDs
args.description: Comma-separated channel IDs.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $setIgnoredRoles
description: Sets roles whose members won't earn XP. Comma-separated IDs; pass empty to clear.

args.name: roleIDs
args.description: Comma-separated role IDs.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $setIgnoredUsers
description: Sets users who won't earn XP. Comma-separated IDs; pass empty to clear.

args.name: userIDs
args.description: Comma-separated user IDs.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $setLevelConfig
description: Sets a per-guild leveling config value.

args.name: key
args.description: The config key to set.

args.name: value
args.description: The value to set (parsed as JSON where applicable).

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $setLevelNotification
description: Configures level-up notification behaviour. type: channel | dm | custom | none

args.name: type
args.description: Notification destination: channel, dm, custom, or none.

args.name: message
args.description: Template: {user} {level} {oldLevel} {xp} {guild}

args.name: channelID
args.description: Override channel for type=channel.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $toggleLevels
description: Toggles the leveling system on/off for this guild. Returns the new state.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $levelEventGuildID
description: Inside a level event command, returns the guild ID.

name: $levelEventLevel
description: Inside a levelReward event command, returns the level that triggered the reward.

name: $levelEventNewLevel
description: Inside a levelUp event command, returns the new level.

name: $levelEventOldLevel
description: Inside a levelUp event command, returns the old level.

name: $levelEventRewardLabel
description: Inside a levelReward event command, returns the reward label.

name: $levelEventTotalXp
description: Inside a levelUp event, returns the member's total XP after levelling up.

name: $levelEventUserID
description: Inside a levelUp/xpGain/levelReward event, returns the user ID.

name: $levelEventXp
description: Inside an xpGain event, returns the XP gained. Inside levelUp, returns total XP.

name: $leaderboard
description: Returns a formatted leaderboard string for this guild.

args.name: page
args.description: The page number (default: 1).

args.name: perPage
args.description: Entries per page (default: 10, max: 25).

args.name: format
args.description: Row format. Tokens: {position} {userID} {user} {level} {xp} {messages}.

args.name: separator
args.description: Row separator (default: newline).

args.name: sort
args.description: Sort field: xp (default), level, or messages.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $leaderboardJson
description: Returns the leaderboard as a JSON string for fully custom rendering.

args.name: page
args.description: The page number (default: 1).

args.name: perPage
args.description: Entries per page (default: 10, max: 25).

args.name: sort
args.description: Sort field: xp (default), level, or messages.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $leaderboardSize
description: Returns the total number of ranked members in the guild.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $getLevel
description: Returns a member's current level.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $resetGuildLevels
description: Wipes ALL leveling data (XP, levels, messages) for every member in this guild.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $resetLevel
description: Resets a member's XP and level to 0.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID to reset. Defaults to command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $setLevel
description: Sets a member's level, adjusting their XP to the base of that level.

args.name: level
args.description: The level to set.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $getRank
description: Returns a member's leaderboard rank in this guild (1 = highest XP).

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $getTotalMessages
description: Returns the total messages sent by a member (tracked since join).

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $addMessageReward
description: Adds a custom reward label at a specific level. Fires the levelReward event.

args.name: level
args.description: The level that triggers this reward.

args.name: label
args.description: A name/label for this reward.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $addRoleReward
description: Adds a role reward granted when a member reaches a specific level.

args.name: level
args.description: The level that triggers this reward.

args.name: roleID
args.description: The role ID to grant.

args.name: persistent
args.description: Whether to keep this role when surpassing the level (default: true).

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $getRoleRewards
description: Returns a formatted list of all role rewards configured for this guild.

args.name: format
args.description: Row format. Supports: {level} {roleID} {persistent}. Default: "Level {level}: <@&{roleID}>"

args.name: separator
args.description: Row separator (default: newline).

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $removeMessageReward
description: Removes a message reward at a level. Optionally filter by label.

args.name: level
args.description: The level to remove the reward from.

args.name: label
args.description: Label to match (optional).

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $removeRoleReward
description: Removes the role reward configured at a specific level.

args.name: level
args.description: The level whose reward should be removed.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $addXp
description: Manually adds XP to a member, triggering levelUp if applicable.

args.name: xp
args.description: Amount of XP to add.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to the command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to the current guild.

name: $getXp
description: Returns a member's total XP in this guild.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID to look up. Defaults to the command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to the current guild.

name: $levelProgress
description: Returns the member's progress percentage (0-100) toward the next level.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $removeXp
description: Removes XP from a member (floor: 0). Recalculates their level.

args.name: xp
args.description: Amount of XP to remove.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to current guild.

name: $setXp
description: Sets a member's total XP directly, recalculating their level.

args.name: xp
args.description: The XP value to set.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user ID. Defaults to the command author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID. Defaults to the current guild.

name: $xpForNextLevel
description: Returns the XP needed for the member's next level.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $xpProgress
description: Returns the member's XP within their current level (not total XP).

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to author.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild ID. Defaults to current.

name: $xpRequired
description: Returns the XP required to reach a given level. Mode: step (default) or cumulative.

args.name: level
args.description: The target level.

args.name: mode
args.description: step = XP for that level only; cumulative = total XP from 0.

args.name: guildID
args.description: The guild ID (for config). Defaults to current guild.
